productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Pre St Cl Jsy Black T-Shirts
description: Composition Black short Sleeve sleeves football jersey made of 100% polyester, has a Round Neck neck with a cut-out design detail and fabric tape detailing on the inseam, three bright blue stripes on the shoulders upto the cuff signifying the adidas logo, embossed football pattern across the chest with thread detailing under it, brand name and logo embroidered on the right chest, contoured mesh panels on the sides and engineered with ClimaLite technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Do not dry clean If football is your life, this black jersey from adidas beLong Sleeves in your wardrobe. The stripes on the shoulder are not just the Adidas logo, they also add a dose of fresh colour and style to the tee. Engineered with ClimaLite cotton, this tee draws sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable all day. Pair it with tracks or Short Sleeves and bring glory to your team as you score.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1'', Chest- 38.5”
